sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Check current bar position
seg = current_frame.segmentation['nodes']
for n in seg:
    if n['color'] == 'O':
        print(f"Orange: boundary={n['boundary']}")
    if n['color'] == 'b' and n['pixels'] == 15:
        print(f"Blue bar: boundary={n['boundary']}")
    if n['color'] == 'W':
        print(f"White cross: boundary={n['boundary']}")

# Check progress bar
for n in seg:
    if n['color'] == 'Y':
        print(f"Yellow: pixels={n['pixels']}, boundary={n['boundary']}")
    if n['color'] == 'R':
        print(f"Red: pixels={n['pixels']}, boundary={n['boundary']}")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
